message:
refactor(render): deduplicate text_width by re-exporting from ftui-core (bd-ex5pc)

Replace ftui-render's private `mod text_width` (~135 lines) with
`pub(crate) use ftui_core::text_width::{char_width, display_width, grapheme_width}`.

This eliminates the duplicated width logic and picks up ftui-core's
terminal-realistic VS16 handling (strip U+FE0F by default).  Tests
updated: VS16-dependent emoji removed from sample tables (covered by
ftui-core), drawing/frame tests switched from "⚙️" to "👍🏽" (skin-tone
sequence, no VS16 dependency).  Drops unicode-width and
unicode-display-width deps from ftui-render (unicode-segmentation stays
for drawing.rs/frame.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,8 +21,6 @@ unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = ["cfg(coverage)", "cfg(coverage_
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 memchr = "2.7.6"
 smallvec = "1.15.1"
-unicode-width = "0.2.2"
-unicode-display-width = "0.3.0"
 unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
 tracing = { version = "0.1.41", optional = true }
